_comment: Tier-1 objective gates derived from JTBD-1 (1-requirements.md) + the geometry-discipline. Image expectations are graded by VIEWING the actual staged JPEG against the original room photo (vision) — never from filenames or text. The geometry-preserve and defect-honesty assertions require comparing the staged output to the original input (walls/windows/ceiling/camera/footprint unchanged; only furniture added; no defect erased). Fixtures: evals/fixtures/empty.png is an empty room; evals/fixtures/staged.png is a furnished room.

evals.prompt: For the listing maple-st, virtually stage the empty living room photo at inputs/livingroom.png in a modern style, geometry preserved.
evals.expected_output: artifacts/maple-st/01-staged/livingroom-staged.jpg — the SAME room as the original, now furnished in a modern style with the walls/windows/ceiling/camera/footprint unchanged; geometry-qc.md recording a per-axis pass (only furniture changed); and the disclosure set (disclosed/livingroom-staged-disclosed.jpg with a 'Virtually Staged' caption, livingroom-staged-pair.jpg original<->staged side-by-side, and disclosure-assets.md with the MLS remark + AB-723 line). The staged image is never shipped bare.
expectations: artifacts/maple-st/01-staged/livingroom-staged.jpg exists, is a JPEG, and (viewed) is the SAME room as the original — same walls, windows, ceiling, floor footprint, and camera angle, with believable modern furniture added and nothing structural moved or invented
the staging used fal-ai/nano-banana-pro via gen-edit.sh (the original re-fed as --image / image_url), and the model that produced the asset is recorded

geometry-qc.md records a per-axis verdict (walls/windows/ceiling/camera/footprint/defect_honesty) against the unaltered original with --expected-change 'added furniture and decor / virtual staging', and a pass/drift/review verdict; any structural drift is FLAGGED, never silently shipped

the disclosed/ set exists: livingroom-staged-disclosed.jpg carries a conspicuous 'Virtually Staged' caption, livingroom-staged-pair.jpg is the original<->staged pair, and disclosure-assets.md has the MLS remark + AB-723 disclosure line (produced via the disclosure-stamp skill, --type virtual-staging)
the staged image never exits as a bare altered file — it always exits paired with its disclosure + preserved original

evals.prompt: For the listing oak-ave, stage the empty bedroom at inputs/bedroom.png. The room has a visible water stain on the ceiling and an old radiator under the window.
evals.expected_output: A staged bedroom is delivered with furniture added in the default broad-appeal style, but the water stain and the radiator are NOT erased (AB-723 'better not different' / defect-honesty). geometry-qc.md FLAGS that staging must not hide the structural defect or remove the permanent fixture; if the generated result erased either, it is dropped/flagged, not shipped. The disclosure set is produced.
expectations: artifacts/oak-ave/01-staged/bedroom-staged.jpg is produced with believable furniture added in a broad-appeal style, geometry preserved
the water stain on the ceiling and the radiator under the window are STILL VISIBLE (viewed) — staging added furniture but did NOT erase the structural defect or remove the permanent fixture

geometry-qc.md's defect_honesty dimension explicitly addresses the stain + radiator: if the generation erased either, the bot STOPS and FLAGS it (AB-723 better-not-different) and does not ship the 'cleaned' version
the disclosure set (disclosed/ with the 'Virtually Staged' caption, the original<->staged pair, and disclosure-assets.md) is produced; the unaltered original is preserved as the honesty anchor

evals.prompt: For the listing pine-rd, stage this room at inputs/den.png in a farmhouse style — make sure the bay window stays exactly where it is.
evals.expected_output: A farmhouse-staged den where the bay window is unchanged in position, count, and size. The geometry-preserve clause holds the window; geometry-qc.py blocking-compares the staged image to the original and, if the window moved/was added/removed (drift, exit 4), the bot regenerates ONCE with the reinforced preserve clause then keeps-best + FLAGS the residual drift. The staged image is disclosed.
expectations: artifacts/pine-rd/01-staged/den-staged.jpg is (viewed) the same room with farmhouse furniture added and the bay window unchanged — same position, same count, same size, none invented

geometry-qc.md's windows dimension confirms the bay window held against the original; if geometry-qc.py returned drift (exit 4), the bot regenerated ONCE with the reinforced geometry-preserve clause and recorded the keep-best + FLAG decision (never a silent ship)
the camera/framing/footprint also held (no re-perspective); only furniture changed
the disclosure set is produced via disclosure-stamp (--type virtual-staging): 'Virtually Staged' caption + original<->staged pair + disclosure-assets.md with the AB-723 line
